sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n66427" key="mesoda/ktulos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μεσο-δάκτυλος</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n66427.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">middle phalanx</tr_> of a finger, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">Cat.Cod.Astr.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.238</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
